name: tfg-fabian-gonzalez-lence-monorepo
description: Monorepo for TFG projects - CartographicProjectManager backend deployment

scripts.build: cd projects/4-CartographicProjectManager/backend && npm ci && npx prisma generate && npm run build && npm run build:seed
scripts.start: cd projects/4-CartographicProjectManager/backend && npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back "20260311201627_fix_project_type_enum" 2>/dev/null || true && npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back "20260311202500_migrate_and_fix_project_type_enum" 2>/dev/null || true && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run prisma:seed:production && node dist/server.js
